which year am i persuing

Hello Pavan! Since I don't have access to your personal information, I can't determine your exact year of study. However, if you're a SOFOMER, it typically means you're in your second year of the four-year undergraduate program in Mechanical Engineering at IIT Guwahati. Are you in your second year or do you have a different program or year in mind? If you'd like to discuss your studies or any other topics, just let me know!
i ma a ece student

Hello Pavan! I see, you're an ECE (Electronics and Communications Engineering) student at IIT Guwahati. That's exciting! ECE is a fascinating field with a wide range of applications, from telecommunications and signal processing to embedded systems and more.

Are you currently working on any interesting projects or courses that you're particularly excited about? Or perhaps you have any questions related to your studies or career in ECE? I'm here to help and discuss anything you'd like to share!

2. You are currently pursuing a degree in Electronics and Communications Engineering (ECE) at IIT Guwahati.
3. You are in your second year of the undergraduate program, as "SOFOMER" typically refers to students in their second year.
4. Your favorite color is black.

Is there anything else you'd like to share or any specific questions you have? Whether it's about your studies, career, or anything else, feel free to let me know!
